Refresh your wardrobe with Denim & Co's spring fashion. Discover stylish, easy-to-wear pieces perfect for the season's fresh start.
Tune in and explore Aimee Kestenberg's extensive range of designer handbags for all occasions, each design boasting a premium blend of supple leather and sculpted hardware.
Discover Apricot fashion, showcasing chic wardrobe staples and elegant pieces to bring your style to life. From fabulous prints to bold pops of colours, discover how you can enliven your look today!

programmes.show_name: Step into Spring with Kim & Co
programmes.show_description: Refresh your wardrobe with Kim & Co's Spring Fashion Edit. Explore full outfits featuring top trends in fashion, accessories, footwear and jewellery. Perfect fits for all body shapes and occasions!
Discover Orfeo Paris, new to QVC. Explore elegant fashion pieces designed to bring Parisian flair and effortless style to your wardrobe.
Explore Weird Fish, new to QVC. Discover casual, comfortable clothing with unique designs, perfect for relaxed days and effortless style.
Discover Raffya, new to QVC. Explore stylish, handcrafted accessories designed to add a touch of elegance and individuality to your look.
Master the art of layering with expert tips and stylish essentials. Discover how to create versatile looks for every season and elevate your wardrobe with ease.
Elevate every outfit with fashionable shoes from Bronx. Crafted from quality materials and in a range of fun, fresh designs, there's a style to suit every wardrobe here at QVC.
Discover playful style with Compañia Fantastica, new to QVC. Explore unique prints and vibrant fashion pieces to refresh your wardrobe with a touch of fun.
We're bringing you the hottest, new season fashion with JDY's range of classic designs, ready to uplift every part of your wardrobe.
Discover new arrivals from Malika Jewellery. Explore stunning designs to add sparkle and sophistication to your collection this season.
Catch up on the highlights from our Fashion Event. Discover standout styles, top trends, and must-have looks to inspire your wardrobe this season.
Upgrade your basics with Everyday Essentials from JDY. Discover versatile styles and must-have pieces to keep your wardrobe fresh, comfortable, and effortlessly chic.

Sleep better with Northern Nights. Discover cosy bedding and expert tips to help you create a restful sanctuary for a peaceful night's sleep.
Step into 1PM with JDY! Discover fresh, trend-led fashion designed to inspire your wardrobe and add effortless style to your everyday look.
Pamper your hands and feet with innovative hand and footcare formulas from international podiatrist and foot expert Margaret Dabbs.
Find the perfect sparkle with this dazzling collection of Diamonique simulated diamonds. You can enjoy all the glamour and style of diamonds without the price tag!
Elevate your look with Occasion Style, hosted by Katy. Discover stunning outfits and accessories perfect for every special event. Tune in for inspiration and expert styling tips!
Find your new favourite bag in this showcase of must-have handbags, from gorgeous totes to clever cross-bodies. Discover yours today!
Create a warm and cosy sanctuary in your home, with the Cozee Home range of snuggly bedding, throws and accessories offering comfort and coziness in your home.
Refresh your wardrobe with Ben de Lisi's Spring Fashion. Discover stylish, versatile pieces designed to brighten your look and add effortless elegance to your everyday.
...Ageing. Keep your skin looking youthful with expert skincare brand StriVectin. Find intensive moisturisers, serums and night creams, for a perfect complexion.
Step out in style in Skechers! Renowned for their on-trend, sporty designs, you can now find their fab shoes at QVC too!
Discover White Stuff in this show, featuring inspired fashion that combines eclectic prints, flattering shapes and fresh designs. Update your wardrobe with pieces you'll wear again and again.
